And I won't let it pass me by ! ! ! ! ! !              Bb2               F2                       Gm2          Eb2                  Bb2 ! Cho.   !                                  F2                            Bbsus/Eb !           for Your presence came and changed me ! I've been changed !! healed !! freed !!! delivered ! ! All my shame !!! guilt !!! sins !!! forgiven ! !! Right now is the moment ! today is the day ! Bbsus/Eb                    F2                                   Gm7. ! I won't go back ! I can't go back ! to the way it used to be ! ! ! 2nd time ! ! ) ! ! !

Right now is the moment ! today is the day ! Bbsus/Eb                    F2                                   Gm7. ! I won't go back ! I can't go back ! to the way it used to be ! ! ! 2nd time ! ! ) ! ! !
